.file-embed.background: rgb(35, 41, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(35, 41, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(44, 51, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(67, 77, 91) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(44, 51, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(44, 51, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(67, 77, 91) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(44, 51, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(35, 41, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(35, 41, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(96, 210, 157, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(44, 51, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(35, 41, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(35, 41, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(35, 41, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(35, 41, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(236, 144, 118) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(67, 77, 91) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(67, 77, 91) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(35, 41, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
